steps.title: Emphasize the research aim
steps.content: The task asks for the aim of the study, meaning what the researchers wanted to investigate. The notes say Ben-Ami's team investigated which factors influence lizard clutch size, a topic studied in birds but not lizards.

steps.title: Separate aim from method
steps.content: Choice B presents a finding. Choice C presents an interpretation of that finding. Choice D presents the data and modeling method. The remaining choice states the research goal and why that goal mattered. The answer is A.
